message:
feat(convert,runtime,classes): add MultiGraph/MultiDiGraph conversion, CgseValue type, and edge key support

Type system (fnx-runtime, fnx-classes):
- Add CgseValue type for typed attribute values (replacing raw String) with
  as_f64() method for numeric extraction
- Change AttrMap from BTreeMap<String, String> to BTreeMap<String, CgseValue>
- All edge_weight helper functions updated to use val.as_f64() instead of
  raw.parse::<f64>()

Conversion layer (fnx-convert — 261 lines added):
- Add multigraph_from_edge_list() and multidigraph_from_edge_list() converters
- Add multigraph_from_adjacency() and multidigraph_from_adjacency() converters
- Add MultiConvertReport and MultiDiConvertReport result types
- Extend GraphLike trait with add_edge_with_key_and_attrs() for multi-edge
  key support; implement for Graph, DiGraph, MultiGraph, MultiDiGraph
- EdgeRecord and AdjacencyEntry now carry optional key field
- Add unit tests for multigraph edge-list conversion

Algorithms (fnx-algorithms):
- Remove unused ordered_nodes variable in shortest_path_weighted_directed

Python bindings (fnx-python):
- Additional Python-facing API surface for new graph types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
